name: Oliver North
title: Marine Corps Lieutenant Colonel (Ret.) & Author
bio: American political commentator, television host, military historian, and former Marine Corps Lieutenant Colonel. Former president of the NRA.
faith: North has been vocal about his Christian faith throughout his public life. He has spoken at churches and faith-based events about how his relationship with God has guided his decisions in military service and public life.

sources.title: Oliver North — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Marine and political figure

tagline: Decorated Marine and bestselling author anchored by faith
